mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(view_count) FROM shop_view_daily WHERE shop_id IN () AND biz_date BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo}),0) AS views, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` WHERE shop_id IN () AND pay_status=1 AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt}),0) AS paid_orders, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM `order` WHERE shop_id IN () AND pay_status=1 AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt}),0) AS paid_amount, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM coupon WHERE shop_id IN () AND status=2 AND verify_at>=#{startAt} AND verify_at<#{endAt}),0) AS verified_coupons, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation WHERE shop_id IN () AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt}),0) AS reservations_total, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation WHERE shop_id IN () AND status=0 AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt}),0) AS pending_reservations, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation WHERE shop_id IN () AND status=1 AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt}),0) AS confirmed_reservations, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation WHERE shop_id IN () AND status=2 AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt}),0) AS arrived_reservations, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation WHERE shop_id IN () AND status=4 AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt}),0) AS rejected_reservations, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation WHERE shop_id IN () AND status=5 AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt}),0) AS no_show_reservations, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(score) FROM shop WHERE id IN ()),0) AS score, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(review_count) FROM shop WHERE id IN ()),0) AS review_count

SELECT biz_date,SUM(views) AS views,SUM(paid_orders) AS paid_orders,SUM(verified_coupons) AS verified_coupons,SUM(reservations) AS reservations FROM ( SELECT biz_date, SUM(view_count) views,0 paid_orders,0 verified_coupons,0 reservations FROM shop_view_daily WHERE shop_id IN () AND biz_date BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} GROUP BY biz_date UNION ALL SELECT CAST(created_at AS DATE),0,COUNT(1),0,0 FROM `order` WHERE shop_id IN () AND pay_status=1 AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt} GROUP BY CAST(created_at AS DATE) UNION ALL SELECT CAST(verify_at AS DATE),0,0,COUNT(1),0 FROM coupon WHERE shop_id IN () AND status=2 AND verify_at>=#{startAt} AND verify_at<#{endAt} GROUP BY CAST(verify_at AS DATE) UNION ALL SELECT CAST(created_at AS DATE),0,0,0,COUNT(1) FROM reservation WHERE shop_id IN () AND created_at>=#{startAt} AND created_at<#{endAt} GROUP BY CAST(created_at AS DATE) ) metric GROUP BY biz_date ORDER BY biz_date
